title: posting.rs: .unwrap() on header parse in list_conversations
description: File: src/posting.rs (list_conversations, pagination link header). The code calls 'link.parse().unwrap()' when inserting the Link header into the response. If pagination_link_header ever returns a string with invalid header characters (e.g., non-ASCII in a URL), this will panic on a network-reachable code path. Should use .map_err() or filter invalid values.
